Pupil List

Analysis
Filter by category
Show:
Show rating:
Concern level: Low Medium High
Concern level explained
Low (1)
One concern area — monitor and note.
Medium (2)
Two concern areas — consider pastoral contact.
High (3–4)
Three+ areas — priority review, possible referral.
Concern areas: Progress status, Effort, Behaviour, Homework
— click any bar to drill into pupils

Admin Access
Enter password to continue
Admin Settings
St Ambrose High School — Pupil Tracker
Branding & identity
Logo preview
Site access password
Require a password on the splash screen — recommended when hosting on GitHub Pages or any public URL. Staff enter this password once per browser session.
Site password set ✓ — now click Save changes then Export
Colour scheme
Changes apply live — click Save to make permanent
Quick themes
Upload data
Select a year group, then upload its tracking or attendance file.
Year group:
S2 — BGE (CfE Levels 1–3)  ·  Upload tracking XLSX in the standard format.
Termly tracking
Upload the tracking XLSX for this year group. The file will populate the Teacher View and Management analysis.
Monthly attendance
Add a new month's attendance. Format: Known As · Surname · Reg Class · Absences · Lates · Attendance %
Equity profile upload
Upload a school equity profile extract (XLSX). Replaces FSM, LAC, ASN, EAL and gender data school-wide. SIMD deciles are preserved from the built-in dataset. Rows without a Register Class or with Admission ≠ Current are skipped.
No equity file uploaded — using built-in data.
Subject display settings
Rename subjects (display name only — data is unaffected) or hide them from all views for each year group.
Year group:
Original name
Display name (rename)
Art
Business Education
Design & Manufacture
English
Health & Wellbeing
Mathematics
Music
Physical Education
Religious Ed
Science
Social Subjects
Spanish
Admin password
Change the password required to access these settings
Export configured file
Generates a ready-to-share HTML file with your branding, logo, colours and last-updated date baked in. Recipients will see the tracker exactly as you have it — no setup required.
What gets baked in: school name · logo · colours · home screen label · last updated date
Not included: health notes · manually entered attendance (these stay on your device only)
Preparing file…
